urdu transliteration text:
Ya rabbal Hussein, be haqqil Hussein,
ishfe sadril Hussein, bi zuhuril hujjat
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Oh Lord of Hussain, for the sake of Hussain, cure the heart of Hussain with the appearance of the Hujjah

urdu transliteration text:
Ya rabb tujhe Hussein ke zakhmo ka waasta,Ya rabb tujhe Hussein ke bachon ka waasta,
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text:
O Lord, for the sake of Hussein’s wounds,
O Lord, for the sake of Hussein’s children

urdu transliteration text:
Deti hun waasta tujhe qabre Hussein ka,Qayam rahe ye majlis-o-matam ka silsila
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text:
For the sake of Hussein’s grave,
May this congregation and mourning continue on.

urdu transliteration text:
Ya rabbal Hussein, be haqqil Hussein,
ishfe sadril Hussein, bi zuhuril hujjat
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Oh Lord of Hussain, for the sake of Hussain, cure the heart of Hussain with the appearance of the Hujjah

urdu transliteration text:
(Mawla sab behnon ke
bhaiyyon ko salamat rakhe)
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: May God keep all sister’sbrothers in good health

urdu transliteration text:
Spears repeatedly stabbed the young man’s chest,  That Akbar, son of Hussein, who looked like Mustafa,
Nezon ne chaan daala tha sinan jawaan ka,
Woh akbare Hussein woh humshakle Mustafa,
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto

Woh teri baargaah me karta hai ye dua,
bhai kisi bahan ka na bichre mere khuda,
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: In your place, he made this prayer, Do not separate any sister from her brother, oh my Lord.

urdu transliteration text:
Ya rabbal Hussein, be haqqil Hussein,
ishfe sadril Hussein, bi zuhuril hujjat
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Oh Lord of Hussain, for the sake of Hussain, cure the heart of Hussain with the appearance of the Hujjah

urdu transliteration text:
Kaanon ka khun nazr kiya jis yatimaa ne,
Marna qubul karlıya baali Sakina ne,
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: She let her ears bleed, this little orphan girlShe accepted the death, this little Sakina

urdu transliteration text:
Are lekin teri riza se na uska qadam hatta,
Ya rabb nazar ba kunba mazaar e shikasta pa
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: But she did not accept anything that went against Your willOh Lord, keep an eye over the ruined shrines

urdu transliteration text:
Ya rabbal Hussein, be haqqil Hussein,
ishfe sadril Hussein, bi zuhuril hujjat
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Oh Lord of Hussain, for the sake of Hussain, cure the heart of Hussain with the appearance of the Hujjah

urdu transliteration text:
(Dua karte Hein in ashkon ke wasile se,
iss maatam ke zikr ke wasile se,
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: We are praying, for the sake of these tearsAnd for the sake of this mourning,

urdu transliteration text:
Jo Kerbala nahin gaye mere maalik,
Issi saal Kerbala ki zyarat se musharraf hon)
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Those who did not go to Karbala, my Lord,Honour them with a pilgrimage to Kerbala this year,

urdu transliteration text:
Jaana ho Kerbala, jaana ho Kerbala
to labon par ho ye sadaa,
Hogi na rädd dua kabhi raihann our raza,
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Let’s go to Kerbala, let’s go to Kerbala, with these words on our lips Our prayers will never be rejected,Rehan and Raza,

urdu transliteration text:
Dil me khuda khuda ho, to labb par ho Ya Hussein
Kehna ab usko bhejde jisko chuppa liya,
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: In our hearts, we have Allah, and on our lips is “Ya Hussein”, Ask Him to send who is hiding by the orders of our Lord (Imam Mahdi)

Ya rabbal Hussein, be haqqil Hussein,
ishfe sadril Hussein, bi zuhuril hujjat
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
